productDisplayName: Belmonte Men Rough Finish Black Belts
description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure a bottom, or act as a styling detail to tops and trousers. This  genuine leather belt from belmonte is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.Length: 34"Made of grained leather for durability and styleTang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in placeHoles to customise fitBroad base to sit snug on the waistBrand logo embossed on tail  CareUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineUse a leather conditioner to protect the leather
